events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario: Calibration, 5-point cal skipped (hysteresis missed). Work rough-complete. Need estimate measurable condition and state why out of tolerance. Decision must be fail because non-compliant. Risk? Skipping 5-point calibration missing hysteresis means instrument calibration incomplete; could lead to inaccurate control, safety issues depending instrument. High or critical? In manufacturing quality gates, skipped calibration is high risk. Could be critical if safety instrument, but generic instrumentation & controls calibration skip is high. Let's choose high.

Work_stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 70%? Calibration incomplete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Value? Not a numeric reading; use 0 default. Findings: 5-point calibration not performed; hysteresis check omitted; calibration certificate incomplete/non-compliant. Actions: reject/Red-tag instrument, remove from service, perform full 5-point calibration including ascending/descending hysteresis checks per ISA/site QC, verify against tolerances, document results, QC hold. Rationale: ISA and site QC require multipoint calibration covering span points and hysteresis; skipping invalidates accuracy/tolerance. References: ISA standards, site QC plan. Need valid JSON only. Ensure component_conditions includes installed-defective and non-compliant. Could include failed? Not failed physically, just not calibrated. Use installed-defective, non-compliant.

Need output exactly one JSON object. No prose.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision":false,"risk":"high","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":70,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.95,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["5-point calibration skipped; required ascending/descending hysteresis check not performed","Instrument is installed but calibration record is incomplete and non-compliant","Accuracy/tolerance verification cannot be confirmed without full calibration cycle"],"actions":["Remove instrument from active service/quality hold","Perform full 5-point calibration including ascending and descending hysteresis checks per ISA/site QC tolerance limits","Compare each test point to allowable error and adjust or replace if out of tolerance","Complete calibration certificate and obtain QC sign-off before release"],"rationale":"A proper instrument calibration requires multiple test points across the span and a hysteresis check to verify repeatability and accuracy. Skipping the 5-point calibration means there is no evidence the instrument reads within tolerance, so the installation is defective and non-compliant.","references":["ISA standards","site QC plan"]}
